title: Combustible Depths
description: A mod that adds 2 new explosive blocks to the Nether to make Netherite mining more fun.
body:
# Combustible Depths
A small fabric mod that adds 2 new explosive blocks to the nether, that explode when interacted with. Based on the Thermite Wall from Core Keeper.

## Features
<details>
  
<summary>
  Ignite & Soul Ignite
  </summary>

- found in the Nether, Soul Ignite specifically in the Soul Sand Valley
- when interacted with, activates and explodes all nearby Ignite
- can be safely mined with silk touch
- can be crafted with gunpowder, a fire charge and flint/soul sand

</details>

## SUGGESTIONS / ISSUES
Have something to suggest or found a bug? Either [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs) or [make an issue in our GitHub](https://github.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Combustible-Depths/issues).
